changes_made: Changed 'k8s_rbac_role_binding_to_specific_namespaces' to 'k8s_rbac_role_binding_restricted_to_namespaces' for clarity and consistency
review_notes: The functions are generally well-aligned with the ISO27001 A.8.2 control on privileged access rights, focusing on Kubernetes RBAC configurations. The naming mostly follows the conventions, but one function name was adjusted for clarity and consistency.
naming_improvements: Use 'restricted_to_namespaces' instead of 'to_specific_namespaces' for better clarity
title: Privileged Access Rights
step1_reasoning: The control A.8.2 focuses on privileged access rights, which directly maps to Kubernetes RBAC configurations. Ensuring that no users or service accounts have unnecessary cluster-admin privileges aligns with the principle of least privilege. Additionally, restricting role bindings to specific namespaces and ensuring service accounts do not have excessive privileges are critical to managing privileged access in Kubernetes.
